title: Nudge
description: A gentle reminder app for recurring things — groceries, medications, filters, anything you tend to forget. Full-stack PWA with push notifications, sharing, and offline support.

title: OVH DynDNS Client
description: Lightweight DynDNS client for OVH domains. Keeps your DNS record in sync with your dynamic public IP — perfect for self-hosted setups behind a residential connection.

title: Synology Video Enhancer
description: Transcoding optimisation tool for Synology Photos. Automatically re-encodes videos to H.264 High Profile or H.265/HEVC, fixing the quality issues of Synology's default mobile transcoding pipeline.

title: YourFisio
description: Physiotherapy management platform developed at Stickybit. Patient tracking, session scheduling and exercise prescription for clinics.

title: eBird
description: Bird sightings logged on eBird — Cornell Lab's global citizen science platform. Just getting started with ornithology, but already hooked on finding and identifying species along the Galician coast.

title: HappyWhale
description: Contributed 50+ individual whale identifications to HappyWhale — a global cetacean research database. Fin whales and humpbacks off the Galician coast.

title: CarbWise
description: Carbohydrate calculator built to help people with diabetes manage their diet. Look up carb values from official sources and calculate insulin doses — simple, fast and mobile-first.

title: Lego Builder
description: A personal experiment — image recognition tool that identifies Lego bricks and suggests possible builds. Because why not?

title: Synology Service Stack
description: Ready-to-deploy dockerised services — the must-have stack for Synology NAS. Pre-configured Docker Compose setups for the most useful self-hosted services.

title: Work Time Control
description: Time control system for registering and reviewing working hours. Supports multiple users with individual timezones and weekly hour targets. Web dashboard and Excel export.

title: Digitally Wise Seniors
description: Suite of HTML5 games designed to help seniors develop touchscreen skills and digital confidence. Runs locally on any device, no installation required.
